mos-eisley-cantina.title: Mos Eisley Cantina
mos-eisley-cantina.content: A dimly lit tavern known for its diverse clientele and 'no droids' policy. A perfect place to find a pilot for hire.
mos-eisley-cantina.lore: A dimly lit tavern known for its diverse clientele and 'no droids' policy. A perfect place to find a pilot for hire.

obi-wan-kenobi.title: Obi-Wan Kenobi
obi-wan-kenobi.content: A legendary Jedi Master living in exile on Tatooine. He watches over young Luke Skywalker from a distance.
obi-wan-kenobi.lore: A legendary Jedi Master living in exile on Tatooine. He watches over young Luke Skywalker from a distance.

darth-vader.title: Darth Vader
darth-vader.content: The dark lord of the Sith and primary enforcer of the Galactic Empire. He is currently hunting for the stolen Death Star plans.
darth-vader.lore: The dark lord of the Sith and primary enforcer of the Galactic Empire. He is currently hunting for the stolen Death Star plans.

galactic-empire.title: Galactic Empire
galactic-empire.content: The tyrannical government that rules the galaxy with an iron fist. They are currently constructing a massive superweapon.
galactic-empire.lore: The tyrannical government that rules the galaxy with an iron fist. They are currently constructing a massive superweapon.

krayt-dragon.title: Krayt Dragon
krayt-dragon.content: A massive carnivorous reptile native to Tatooine. Its pearls are highly valued by Tusken Raiders.
krayt-dragon.lore: A massive carnivorous reptile native to Tatooine. Its pearls are highly valued by Tusken Raiders.

death-star-plans.title: Death Star Plans
death-star-plans.content: Technical readouts for the Empire's ultimate weapon. They contain a fatal flaw hidden by a rebel sympathizer.
death-star-plans.lore: Technical readouts for the Empire's ultimate weapon. They contain a fatal flaw hidden by a rebel sympathizer.

battle-of-yavin.title: Battle of Yavin

connections.label: Plans used to find the flaw

battle-of-yavin.content: A major confrontation that resulted in the destruction of the first Death Star. It marked the first major victory for the Rebel Alliance.
battle-of-yavin.lore: A major confrontation that resulted in the destruction of the first Death Star. It marked the first major victory for the Rebel Alliance.
